name: ux-skill
description: Design intelligence engine for AI coding. v2 ships a Python-backed reasoning core (5-parallel-search recommender) over 11 queryable JSON manifests: 84 styles, 176 palettes, 70 type pairs, 148 components, 184 industries, 112 named UX laws, 57 motion presets, 35 anti-pattern regex rules, 72 brand specs. Cross-IDE — runs in 17 environments. Plus 22 slash commands and 5 sub-agents. Anti-AI-slop by default.

plugins.name: ux
plugins.description: v2.0 Python pivot. 22 callable slash commands (recommend, init, stats, discover, frame, audit, critique, a11y, copy, motion, polish, design, system, dashboard, component, fix, case-study, next, expert, research, workshop, lint), 5 specialized sub-agents, Python-backed 5-parallel-search recommender, 11 queryable JSON manifests (998 entries total), 35-rule anti-AI-slop linter, mandatory 10-field discovery protocol, 72 brand DESIGN.md specs, cross-IDE distribution to 17 environments (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, Gemini, Codex, Cline, Continue, Aider, Zed, etc.). pip install uxskill or npx uxskill init.
